ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clothing_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing item */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the clothing item (e.g., tops, bottoms, dresses) */,
  "fabric_type" TEXT /* Type of fabric used for the clothing item */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the clothing item */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the clothing item */,
  "style" TEXT /* Style of the clothing item (e.g., casual, formal) */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the clothing item (e.g., cotton, polyester) */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season of the clothing item (e.g., summer, winter) */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the clothing item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item the size chart belongs to */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., S, M, L) */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the clothing item in inches */,
  "bust" REAL /* Bust measurement of the clothing item in inches */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement of the clothing item in inches */,
  "hip" REAL /* Hip measurement of the clothing item in inches */,
  "measurement_system" TEXT /* Measurement system used (e.g., inches, centimeters) */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the customer's account */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer (e.g., male, female) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the customer in inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the customer in pounds */,
  "body_type" TEXT /* Body type of the customer (e.g., petite, athletic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer the measurement belongs to */,
  "bust" REAL /* Bust measurement of the customer in inches */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement of the customer in inches */,
  "hip" REAL /* Hip measurement of the customer in inches */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date the measurement was taken */,
  "measurement_time" TEXT /* Time the measurement was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_measurements_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size recommendation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer the recommendation belongs to */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item the recommendation is for */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Recommended size for the customer */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was made */,
  "recommendation_time" TEXT /* Time the recommendation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address of the customer */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address of the customer */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in the order */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Price of each item */,
  "subtotal" REAL /* Subtotal of each item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in stock */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Size of the item */,
  "warehouse_location" TEXT /* Warehouse location of the inventory */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level of the inventory */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Reorder quantity of the inventory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales trend entry */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item */,
  "sales_date" TEXT /* Date of the sales trend */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity sold of the item on the given date */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of sales trend (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_trends_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the analytics entry */,
  "total_sales" INTEGER /* Total sales on the given date */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue on the given date */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Metric being measured (e.g., sales, revenue) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who provided the feedback */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the customer */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating provided by the customer (1-5) */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
